/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/test_mockingboard.dir/mockingboard_smoke_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mockingboard.dir/__/Mockingboard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mockingboard.dir/__/M6502.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mockingboard.dir/__/Memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mockingboard.dir/__/SlotBus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mockingboard.dir/__/CassetteDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mockingboard.dir/__/AudioDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mockingboard.dir/__/SpeakerDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mockingboard.dir/__/RomLoader.cpp.o -o test_mockingboard  -ldl -lm
